text.title: MCP Server Catalog Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the team need an MCP integration for a given service?

conclusion.verdict: no action; revisit at next quarterly catalog refresh

branch.question: Does the catalog have a `use`-rated server for the service?

conclusion.verdict: install the `use`-rated server; do not build a custom one
install `monitor` with caveats; plan a quarterly recheck OR build replacement
build custom MCP server (apply `mcp` methodology); add to catalog when shipped

text.example: need=true → q-catalog-has: github-mcp rated `use` → install github-mcp; skip custom build.
